experience.title: Technology Instructor

achievements.achievement: Develop and deliver interactive course materials for 50+ students per term.
Manage and update a GitHub repository hosting open-source course materials.
Host live coding sessions, debugging student projects in real-time and archiving recordings for asynchronous review.
Participate in ongoing professional development, including monthly instructor training seminars.

experience.technologies: C#, Databases, ASP .Net Core, Front End Frameworks, Javascript, Java, GitHub, Azure

experience.title: Senior Software Developer

achievements.achievement: Developed and maintained cross-platform client API for BaaS to add gamification and real-time multiplayer tech for AAA and Indie Studios.
Developed and released demo games and projects.
Engineered and maintained CI/CD and TDD pipeline.
Responded to customer issues and feature requests.

experience.technologies: Unreal Engine, C++, Objective-C, Swift, iOS, Android Native, Java, PlayStation, Node.js, Groovy, C# (Unity, Godot), Shell Script, MacOS, Windows, Linux

experience.title: Co-founder/ Lead Developer

achievements.achievement: Designed, coded and published nine games to commercial app stores for mobile devices.
Experimented with cutted edge device tech and SDKs.

experience.technologies: Unreal Engine, Objective-C / Swift, iOS, Android Native, Kotlin, Augmented Reality, MacOS, Windows

achievements.achievement: Developed tools used mathematical modelled to maximize production and improve efficiency for major oil & gas corporations.
Led research on a new system that reduced build times by 40%.

experience.title: Intermediate Software Engineer
experience.company: BJ Pipeline Inspection Services Inc. (Baker Hughes)

achievements.achievement: Visualised in-line device data with OpenGL graphics.
Implemented neural network algorithms for anomaly detection.
Led development of custom web-based GIS reported software.
Improved low-level programming algorithms for data processing.

experience.technologies: C++, C, OpenGL, PHP, SQL, Neural Networks, Borland, Windows, Linux

experience.title: Co-founder / App Developer / Instructor

achievements.achievement: Created and published physics-based games for iOS.
Technical writing, web development, google maps and firebase integration and server administration.
Developed course curriculum, instructed C++ programming and assessed student work with Department of Continued Education.

experience.technologies: C++, C, OpenGL, PHP, SQL, Neural Networks, Borland, Windows, Linux

achievements.achievement: Lead developer and system administrator for an iTunes like music store.
Automated DRM encoded and video streamed.
Developed a prototype for a Google competitive search engine.

experience.title: Junior Software Engineer

achievements.achievement: Ported applications to operate under a new GUI library.
Developed user interfaces for software lifecycle automation.

experience.technologies: C++, Shell script, Windows, Unix, Qt, Wx

experience.title: Research Assistant
experience.company: VLab Computer Graphics Group / Artificial Intelligence Research Hub

achievements.achievement: Developed graphics software tools used fractal math and biological modelling.
Managed network setup and code base for distributed computing.
Participated in interdepartmental projetcs, published five research papers, led student tutorials and marked assignments.

experience.technologies: C++, OpenGL, Solaris, MacOS, Unix, Linux, PHP, MySQL, Qt
